description: Perform a complete cross-validation of the Noto Peninsula earthquake data in the SeisComP database (user: sysop, pass: sysop, db: seiscomp) to verify the structural linkage between Event, preferredOriginID, Origin, preferredMagnitudeID, and Magnitude. Save an XML dump of the database to /home/ga/event_dump.xml and generate a structured validation report at /home/ga/earthquake_validation_report.txt. The report must contain the following keys formatted as KEY: VALUE (one per line): EVENT_ID, ORIGIN_ID, MAGNITUDE_ID, ORIGIN_TIME, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, DEPTH_KM, MAGNITUDE_VALUE, MAGNITUDE_TYPE, ORIGIN_REF_VALID (YES/NO), MAG_ORIGIN_LINK_VALID (YES/NO), PREFERRED_ORIGIN_EXISTS (YES/NO), PREFERRED_MAG_EXISTS (YES/NO), and OVERALL_VALID (YES/NO).
